tools.name: get_api_catalog
tools.description: Return the Quiz.Video API catalog linkset for agent discovery.

tools.name: get_openapi_spec
tools.description: Return the Quiz.Video OpenAPI 3.1 specification.

tools.name: get_llms_txt
tools.description: Return a compact LLM-readable summary of the Quiz.Video API.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_quizzes
tools.description: List quizzes owned by the authenticated user with optional pagination (page, limit).

tools.name: quiz_video_get_quiz
tools.description: Fetch a single quiz (including settings and metadata) by id.

tools.name: quiz_video_create_quiz
tools.description: Create a quiz. Prefer sending themeDescription or themeCustomization so the saved quiz has a custom visual theme; if omitted, the server derives one from the title/description. Omit backgroundMusicId to use default YouTube-safe shared background music, or set null for silent. Required: title. Option

tools.name: quiz_video_generate_quiz
tools.description: AI-generate and save a quiz from a topic. Prefer providing themeDescription or themeCustomization; when omitted, the server derives and saves a topic-based custom theme. Omit backgroundMusicId to use default YouTube-safe shared background music, or set null for silent. The response `data` always inc

tools.name: quiz_video_update_quiz
tools.description: Update a quiz. `updates` accepts any subset of quiz settings (title, description, format, template, timing, music, TTS, publish status, etc.).

tools.name: quiz_video_delete_quiz
tools.description: Permanently delete a quiz and all of its questions, answers, and hooks.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_quiz_questions
tools.description: List questions (and their answers) for a quiz.

tools.name: quiz_video_add_quiz_questions
tools.description: Append one or more questions (with their answers and optional images) to an existing quiz.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_quiz_hooks
tools.description: List video hooks configured for a quiz.

tools.name: quiz_video_create_quiz_hook
tools.description: Create a hook for a quiz. `hook` is a pass-through object whose fields follow the HookInput schema (see OpenAPI spec).

tools.name: quiz_video_update_quiz_hook
tools.description: Update an existing hook on a quiz. Requires quizId and numeric hookId; `updates` is a partial HookInput.

tools.name: quiz_video_delete_quiz_hook
tools.description: Delete a single hook from a quiz.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_flashcard_decks
tools.description: List flashcard decks owned by the authenticated user with optional pagination.

tools.name: quiz_video_get_flashcard_deck
tools.description: Fetch a flashcard deck (including all cards) by id.

tools.name: quiz_video_create_flashcard_deck
tools.description: Create a flashcard deck. Required: title (3-120 chars) and cards[] (min 1). Optional: description (≤1200 chars), tags (≤50 each).

tools.name: quiz_video_delete_flashcard_deck
tools.description: Permanently delete a flashcard deck and all of its cards.

tools.name: quiz_video_create_render
tools.description: Queue a new video render for an existing quiz. Returns the render sessionId; poll quiz_video_get_render until its status is "completed" (typically 1-5 minutes), then call quiz_video_download_render to obtain the signed MP4 URL. The quiz itself is viewable immediately at /quiz/{slug}/ regardless of r

tools.name: quiz_video_get_render
tools.description: Fetch the status and progress of a render session. When status is "completed", the response also contains a signed `videoUrl` (and `filename`) so the agent can share the MP4 directly without a separate quiz_video_download_render call. In-progress polls return status + progress.

tools.name: quiz_video_download_render
tools.description: Request a signed download URL for a completed render.

tools.name: quiz_video_get_account
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's account info, plan, and usage limits.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_music
tools.description: List available background music tracks.

tools.name: quiz_video_list_templates
tools.description: List the caller's saved custom templates (and optionally public ones). Templates are reusable scene-based designs that can be applied to many quizzes.

tools.name: quiz_video_get_template
tools.description: Fetch a single custom template (including the full scenes/layers payload) by id.

tools.name: quiz_video_create_template
tools.description: Save a new custom template authored in the drag-and-drop editor. Required: template (the CustomTemplate JSON). Optional: name, description, thumbnail, isDefault, isPublic.

tools.name: quiz_video_update_template
tools.description: Update an existing template. Any subset of fields may be supplied; omitted fields stay unchanged.

tools.name: quiz_video_delete_template
tools.description: Permanently delete a custom template you own. Quizzes that have a snapshot of this template are unaffected — the snapshot remains in their themeCustomization.

tools.name: quiz_video_apply_template
tools.description: Apply a snapshot of a custom template to one or more quizzes you own. Sets each quiz's template field to "custom" and writes the snapshot into themeCustomization.customTemplate. Future edits to the source template do not auto-propagate.
